message:
test(bd-teh7): cover remaining status.rs branches

Add 5 new tests for status covering: format_duration edge cases (0ms,
999ms, 1s, 60s, large), RequestLog defaults, success duration rendering,
cancelled icon, and render routing to plain for non-rich console.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
